step_rationale: Oxidative DNA damage marker; indicates plaque inflammation and endothelial oxidative stress.
mechanism: 8-OHdGuo reflects oxidative DNA damage in inflammatory cells and endothelium during atherosclerotic plaque inflammation and endothelial dysfunction.

references.title: Prediction of myocardial infarction, stroke and cardiovascular mortality with urinary biomarkers of oxidative stress: Results from a large cohort study.
